prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工 科专业社会热度持续偏高；本省2026年普通高考总人数约120万，较2025年大幅增加，按近年物理类占比约61%估算，2026年物理类考生约73.2万人，较2025年55.5万人增长约32% ，竞争显著加剧；江南大学位于江苏无锡，属长三角经济发达地区，对河南考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在河南招生规模较大， 2026年物理类计划223人，为外省211中在豫招生较多的院校之一。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 22560 → 21800 → 17028 → 25762 → 29930, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, it significantly shifted backward by about 8734 places compared to 2023, and continued to move back to 29930 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 12902 places over the past two years, indicating intensifying competition. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for science/physics category were 131 → 140 → 148 → 150 → 159, with a slight annual expansion. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 223, a significant increase of about 40% compared to 2025, which theoretically should cause a notable backward shift in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, showing continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2023, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (related to university management incidents), but in 2026, Jiangnan University was not separately listed in reputation data, and there have been no major negative public incidents in recent years. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 71st, rated as average, with moderate short video exposure and no abnormal signals in application popularity. Food Science and Engineering (A+) and Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+) are both top-tier nationally, directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Food Science and Engineering, Food Quality and Safety, Light Chemical Engineering, and Brewing Engineering, which have strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remains high. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in this province is about 1.2 million, a significant increase from 2025. Based on the recent proportion of physics category candidates at about 61%, the estimated number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 732,000, an increase of about 32% from 555,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Jiangnan University is located in Wuxi, Jiangsu, a developed area in the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong regional appeal for Henan candidates. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Henan, with 223 planned spots in the physics category for 2026, making it one of the out-of-province 211 universities with higher enrollment in Henan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, a significant 40% enrollment expansion in 2026, and a substantial increase of about 32% in local physics category candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 29930, the enrollment expansion would shift the ranking backward by about 7228 places to 37158. Further adjusting for the intensified competition due to the large increase in candidates, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 37658, with a range of 37158–38158.

- Automation (Digital Intelligence Excellence Innovation Class)
- Food Science and Engineering (Food AI Excellence Innovation Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 37158–38158, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 37000), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 Excellence Innovation Classes and computer-related majors. If your ranking is close to the upper bound (e.g., above 38000), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission, while also trying some Tier 2 majors with relatively lower ranking requirements.
